issues.description: Missing Blocker ability entirely. Card has two distinct effects: (1) Blocker mechanic (OnAttack trigger to rest and redirect), (2) Opponent's Turn conditional that prevents KO by trashing self instead. DSL only captures a simple KO on OnAttacked, which is incorrect.
Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent declares attack, Blocker activates), not 'OnAttacked'. OnAttacked is passive damage received.
Action is KO, but Blocker doesn't KO anything. It rests the card to redirect attack. Correct action should be 'Rest' with target 'Self'.
Missing second effect: [Opponent's Turn] conditional that triggers OnKO with condition 'DuringOpponentTurn' to replace KO with TrashFromHand action on Self, preventing the KO.
Duration '[Opponent's Turn]' in text requires 'duration:"DuringOpponentTurn"' on second effect, not Permanent or EndOfTurn.
